name: Ubuntu Server (Cloud-Init)
description: Ubuntu Server VM with cloud-init pre-configured. Boots with SSH access, user account, and static IP — no manual installation needed.

cloud_init.notes: Download cloud image: wget https://cloud-images.ubuntu.com/noble/current/noble-server-cloudimg-amd64.img && qm importdisk VMID noble-server-cloudimg-amd64.img local-lvm
